title: Ores+ 2
description: This project adds more diamonds and much more!
body:
Update 1 Content: Red Diamond and all Tools and the Tier 2 Pickaxe!

Update 1.1 Content: The new Red Diamond Biome!

Update 1.2 Content: They're New Apples! They're OP! Try the new Version!

Update 2 Content: Green Diamond (all Tools and Tier 2 Axe) The Tier 2 axe work, but it dropped only one Block!

Update 2.1 Content: The new Green Diamond Biome and some Bug fixes!

Update 3 Content: Yellow Diamond (all Tools and Tier 2 Shovel)

Update 3.3 PINK DIAMOND! ALL TOOLS + TIER 2 HOE OUT NOW!

UPDATE 3.6: THE COAL AGE! (WARNING: TORCHES DON'T WORK!!!!)

UPDATE TIMMEEE: Adds the new Aetherite with new Features! Adds Ore Scanners and Structure Finders TOOO! LOTS OF MORE STUFF WHEN YOU DOWNLOAD THIS MOD FOR FREEE!

The Tier 2 and 3 weapons are upgrades to the normal weapons! The Tier 2 Pickaxe has Vein Miner (only 3-4 blocks), the Tier 2 Sword has Lifesteal so you can deal damage to your opponent and heal yourself and the Tier 2 Axe is able to completely fell trees!

In the new biome you can find the new Blue Diamond Wood! You can make planks out of this! You already know what happens with wood from the normal game! You can craft Stairs usw.

Ok I added Mob Wands... GOOD IDEA??? OR YOU HAVE A GOOD IDEA WRITE IT IN THE COMMENTS!

DIAMOND DIMESION OUT NOWW!

Updates coming random!

I tried to make every month a new Update

Version 3.5.1

I hope you have a nice Experience!

I work hard for you!

Have fun!

The new Golem Also didn't work LOL!

Something NEW is comming to Ores+ 2:(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0587dd3769426624ec6c1b95972ee8984fa41c1_0.webp)!
